release_notes: Big speed + accuracy upgrade. (1) Transcription switched to Groq's whisper-large-v3 — runs on dedicated Whisper hardware ~10x faster than OpenAI, AND it's a newer more accurate model. Expect transcription to drop from ~30s to ~3-5s on a 4-min call. (2) Expanded Whisper vocabulary hint: added the full phonetic alphabet, email-shape examples, and all client/company names — Whisper now primed to preserve spelled names and email patterns. (3) New dedicated email-extraction GPT pass — runs in parallel with scoring whenever a spelled email is detected in the transcript, overrides the scoring pass's email with a verified version. Scoring + analysis still OpenAI GPT-4.1-mini — quality unchanged.
